title: Telerik NuGet Auth - PR Feedback Fixes

stories.title: Replace Telerik interactive prompt with env-var-only pattern
stories.description: PR feedback: Remove the 'Do you need Telerik NuGet feed? (y/N)' opt-in question. Replace with the same pattern used for GitHubPat: check $env:TELERIK_TOKEN first, if not set prompt the user (they can press Enter to skip). Users who set TELERIK_TOKEN in their terminal profile are never prompted.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Do you need the Telerik NuGet feed? (y/N)' opt-in question is removed
Telerik credential handling follows the exact same pattern as GitHubPat: check $env:TELERIK_TOKEN, else Read-Host prompt
If user provides a token (via env var or prompt), Telerik NuGet source, credentials, and package mapping are added to nuget.config
If user presses Enter at the prompt (empty input), Telerik is skipped with no error
A log message indicates when TELERIK_TOKEN is being used from environment
Env var name is TELERIK_TOKEN (matching Rob's suggestion)
stories.notes: PR comment by @rob-freemarket: 'This will add friction to be prompted each time we run the sandbox. Perhaps follow the pattern used for the GitHubPat... $TelerikPat = if ($env:TELERIK_TOKEN) { ... }. Then those who don't want to be prompted each time can update their terminal profile.'
